actions.shell: open -a 'Finder' && sleep 0.1 && osascript -e 'tell app "System Events" to keystroke "g" using {command down, shift down}' && sleep 0.1 && osascript -e 'tell app "System Events" to keystroke "v" using command down' -e 'tell app "System Events" to key code 36' && echo norm > /tmp/karabiner-layer
